title: NATURE MOD
description: A mod that will update your nature in minecraft.New trees, ores, biomes, and plants will be added.
body:
Hi!If you want to add something to your minecraft world, then you can download this mod.
By downloading it, you will get new plants, biomes, a change in the generation of old biomes and structures.
You can follow the development of the mod in my TG channel [MY TG CHANNEL](https://t.me/nikitka_super17w ) I advise you to download new versions, as bugs are fixed in the new versions.
And here's what will be added if you download the mod:
New 6 biomes!
Field
Cornfield
The caves of Fiolita
Arid Valley
The dried-up forest
Pear Orchard
Blocks:
The Lilac Log,
The pear log,
A log of a dead tree.
Sets of blocks made of wood.
Polydium and its minor variations
Polamite and its building variations,
The jasper block and its construction variations,
Kaolin and its building variations,
New ores,
Two new undulating sands,
The salt block,
A block of wormwood,
New plants and mushrooms!
Generation:
New generation of taiga and dark forest biomes,
New trees,
watermelons in the savannah,
New generation in the world,
New structures.
Items:
New food,
New ingots,
a lump of mud,
a slice of pumpkin
